# Rugby Simulator - Copilot Instructions

## ✅ Project Requirements Clarified
- **Type**: 2D Rugby Simulator
- **Tech Stack**: Phaser.js + TypeScript + Node.js
- **Goal**: Turn-based tactical rugby game with retro pixel art style
- **Features**: 5v5 gameplay, AI defense, level editor/player modes

## ✅ Project Scaffolded
- Created TypeScript project structure with Phaser.js
- Set up proper build configuration and development environment
- Implemented modular game architecture

## ✅ Project Customized
- Added rugby-specific game classes and components
- Implemented turn-based system and player mechanics
- Created level management system for admin/player modes

## ✅ Extensions Installation
- No specific extensions required for this project type

- Dependencies installed successfully
- Build process verified and working
- All TypeScript errors resolved

## ✅ Task Creation
- Development server task created and running
- Build tasks configured for dev and production

## ✅ Project Launch
- Dev server running on http://localhost:8080
- Game ready to test in browser
